summary:
## Summary

**Task: Show import diff before accepting** — ✅ Completed

### What was done

Implemented a diff view that compares incoming proposals against the existing PRD tree before user acceptance. When `rex analyze` runs and there are existing PRD items, the output now shows a clear visual diff instead of a plain proposal list.

### Diff markers
| Marker | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `+` | New item — will be added to PRD |
| `~` | Existing parent — will receive new children |
| `=` | Un
